source.title: How to Redeem Your Star Atlas How to Redeem Your Star Atlas UE5 Game Key Game Key
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How to Redeem Your Star Atlas How to Redeem Your Star Atlas UE5 Game Key Game Key.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Redeem via Epic Games Launcher
Open the Epic Games Launcher
Log in to your Epic Games account
Click your username in the upper-right corner
Select Redeem Code
Enter your game key and click Redeem
You should see a success message
Click Back to Home to return to the launcher homepage
Go to your Library, Star Atlas should be there, ready to install
Redeem via Epic Games Store Website
Open your browser and go to https://www.epicgames.com/store
Log in to your Epic Games account
Hover over your profile name in the top-right corner
Click Redeem Code
Enter your game key and click Redeem
Once confirmed, open the Epic Games Launcher
Your game will now appear in your Library
open_questions: Which claims are independently corroborated or later superseded?
